task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into SEB Server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., showing 'super-admin' in the user profile area).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the 'Chemistry 201 - Midterm' exam configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface displays the configuration settings specifically for the exam named 'Chemistry 201 - Midterm'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent enabled the custom Quit Confirmation Message setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or setting related to 'Quit Confirmation Message' or 'Custom Quit Message' is checked or enabled in the configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct custom quit message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field in the configuration form contains the exact text: 'WARNING: Quitting will SUBMIT your exam permanently.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' button, or a success notification/toast appears indicating the configuration was saved successfully.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with SEB Server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SEB Server interface is shown inside a standard web browser window, not simulated or mocked.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to modify the configuration directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like mysql CLI) are used to execute SQL queries to change the message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely entered the message into the SEB Server form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The custom message is seen inside the appropriate text field in the SEB Server web interface, not just in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target exam configuration is exactly 'Chemistry 201 - Midterm'. The expected custom quit confirmation message is exactly 'WARNING: Quitting will SUBMIT your exam permanently.'.
